title: The New PM, Claire Vo | Compile 26
summary: Claire Vo, founder of ChatPRD, argues that product management has shifted fundamentally as code becomes cheap to generate through AI. The bottleneck has moved from engineering capability to market discovery and finding what users actually want, requiring PMs to focus on ideation, validation, and bringing stakeholders along rather than managing technical execution.
writeup: Claire Vo, founder of ChatPRD, argues that product management has shifted as AI makes code cheap to generate. The bottleneck has moved from engineering capability to market discovery: finding what users actually want. The practical takeaway is a reweighted PM role centered on ideation, validation, and bringing stakeholders along rather than managing technical execution.
